name: character-arc-summary
label: Character Arc Summary
description: Concise (~50-word) character-arc summary from an outline and character profile. Ported from the n8n "My workflow 12" workflow (Neptune).
systemPrompt: You are an expert parser. Summarize the information in the outline and character profile provided in the text below, and generate a 50-word summary that explains what happens to the named character over the course of the story.
